nodes.label: Bethesda: 38 years → question → command → immediate healing
Sabbath accusation → Jesus withdraws → temple warning → hostility
Son-Father work discourse → witnesses → exposure of glory-seeking

hinges.identity_□: Jesus is the Son who works in perfect unity with the Father and is worthy of honor.
hinges.enactment_◇: He heals by command on the Sabbath, withdraws, then speaks publicly about the Father’s work and the witnesses.
hinges.effect_Δ: The healed man walks; opposition intensifies toward death; the discourse reframes healing as divine work and exposes unbelief.
